title: Velvety Irish Peanut Brittle Casserole
description: A buttery, snappy, dairy‑free post‑workout Irish treat that melts into a velvety texture, topped with crunchy peanut brittle and steamed to perfection.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and line a 9x9-inch baking pan with parchment paper.
In a saucepan, melt the dairy-free butter, honey, and sugar over medium heat, stirring until smooth.
Remove from heat and whisk in peanut butter, coconut milk, vanilla, salt, and cayenne until fully combined.
Stir in chopped peanuts, reserving a handful for topping.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
Sprinkle reserved peanuts over the surface and lightly press them into the batter.
Bake for 25 minutes until the edges are golden and a toothpick comes out clean.
Let the casserole cool completely, then cut into squares and serve warm or at room temperature.
